options.name: --allowed-licences
options.description:
Comma-seperated list, for example
'mit,apache-2'. If none is provided, all
licences are allowed.

options.name: --exclude-packages-filter
options.description:
RegEx to exclude packages from analyzing.
Must be escaped for Azure DevOps, see
https://www.robvanderwoude.com/escapechars.ph
p. Example: '.*(Microsoft^|System).*

options.name: --include-transitive
options.description:
(Default: false) Include distinct transitive
package licenses.

options.name: --match-output-version
options.description:
(Default: false) If true, only the versions
in the output folders are used. Required
output-path option.

options.name: --sources-path
options.description:
Required. Source path to search the
'project.assets.json' in.
